chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No. 86 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No. 756/2025 (Exemption) 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For order on CMA No. 757/2025 (Stay) 07.11.2025 Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for the applicant. Under instructions learned counsel does not press this reference application, which is accordingly dismissed as withdrawn. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
